Monday 22nd March 2021

Today I went into the geography lab in QMUL and started my prep. I acid washed some Duran jars and prepped 100 exotainers for furnancing. I also started using the pH and conductivity metres. Natalie Ludgate and Michelle Day supervised.

General sampling plan for DOC, anion + cation.

Collect snow in Duran jar filled to the top (or whirlpak bag if can't put in jar) x12
Collect same part of ice core and fill Duran jar (or whirlpak bag if can't put in jar) x12
Back in field lab put in Duran jar if not already done so. x24
Melt at room temp. x24
Filter melt water through plastic syring with glass fibre filters and fill two exotainers and one 50ml centrifuge tube per sample. Freeze and return to UK. x72

Need to book room for tomorrow morning for 9am Teams meeting then 10am meeting with Natalie.
